svg.title: DEQN solver training loop
svg.desc: An outer cycle repeats N_cycles times. Each cycle runs a rollout phase (episode loop of N_episode_length steps alternating random step, forward pass through the NN, and total step) that fills state_episode, then a training phase (N_epochs_per_episode epochs of mini-batches, forward and backward through the NN) that returns a normalized loss. The final rollout state seeds the next cycle.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is starting_state initialized for the very first cycle of DEQN?')
sendPrompt('What is current_state in the DEQN episode loop and how does it relate to state_episode[t]?')
sendPrompt('What does the random step do in DEQN and why is it needed?')
sendPrompt('What does the forward pass compute in the DEQN rollout?')
sendPrompt('What does total_step combine to update current_state in DEQN?')

g.text: supervised pass over state_episode, returns loss

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the training dataset constructed from state_episode in DEQN?')
sendPrompt('How are minibatches drawn in DEQN training?')
sendPrompt('What is the DEQN training loss and what does the backward pass update?')

svg.text: Σ batch losses, then divide by N_episode_length × N_sim_batch
